query:
SELECT a.*, w.name as workerName
FROM availability a
JOIN workers w ON a.workerId = w.id
WHERE w.name LIKE '%å®‡è»’%'
  AND a.weekStartDate <= '2026-02-20'
  AND a.weekEndDate >= '2026-02-20'
LIMIT 1;
